   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "year_order= df['Year'].value_counts().index\n",
    "#value count gets the unique occurnce of the individual years as well as arrnages them in order of frequency\n",
    "location_order = df['Location'].value_counts().index\n",
    "motive_order = df['Motive'].value_counts().index\n",
    "industry_order = df['Industry'].value_counts().index"
   ]
  },

   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,

   "source": [
    "plt.figure(figsize=(20,8))\n",

    "sb.countplot(data=df, y= 'Year', color=sb.color_palette()[2], order= year_order)\n",

   ]
